rules.rule_text: private rule GlassesStrings : Glasses Family { meta: description = "Strings used by Glasses" author = "Seth Hardy" last_modified = "2014-07-22" strings: $ = "thequickbrownfxjmpsvalzydg" $ = "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; Windows NT 5.1; MSIE 7.0; Trident/4.0; %s.%s)" $ = "\" target=\"NewRef\">" condition: all of them }

rule Glasses : Family
{
	meta:
		description = "Glasses family"
		author = "Seth Hardy"
		last_modified = "2014-07-22"

	condition:
		GlassesCode or GlassesStrings
}
